evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 Ohio school_district source inventory from disk. Only 4 distinct source URLs still preserve any path-level leaf signal, covering just 8 county rows total, while 49 distinct URLs remain generic roots only. The leaf-like URLs are https://www.npesc.org/vnews/display.v/SEC/Member%20%26%20Partner%20School%20Districts, https://www.scoesc.org/districts, https://www.wbesc.org/our-schools, https://www.mresc.org/districts-we-serve/; that is still not enough county-grade coverage to truthfully clear district_or_county_education_routing statewide.
